{% trans "What's HankoTrade?" %}

{% trans 'HankoTrade is a widely used trading platform that offers a robust trading environment for both beginners and experienced traders. It provides:' %}

  • {% trans 'Advanced charting and analysis tools' %}
  • {% trans 'Automated trading capabilities' %}
  • {% trans 'Secure and reliable execution' %}
  • {% trans 'Extensive broker support' %}

{% trans 'What can you trade in HankoTrade?' %}

{% trans 'With HankoTrade, you can trade a variety of financial instruments depending on your account type and broker, including:' %}

  • {% trans 'Forex' %}:{% trans 'Major, minor, and exotic currency pairs.' %}
  • {% trans 'Commodities' %}:{% trans 'Gold, silver, oil, and other commodities.' %}
  • {% trans 'Indices' %}:{% trans 'Popular stock market indices such as S&P 500, NASDAQ, DAX, and more.' %}
  • {% trans 'Cryptocurrencies' %}:{% trans 'Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other cryptocurrencies.' %}

{% trans 'HankoTrade login Details' %}

{% trans 'Follow the steps below to get your HankoTrade login details.' %}

1 {% trans 'Create a HankoTrade Account' %}

  • {% trans "If you don't already have a HankoTrade account," %} {% trans 'Create one here.' %}

2 {% trans 'Access Your Trading Account Credentials' %}

{% trans 'After signing up:' %}

  1. {% trans 'Create a demo or live trading account from the HankoTrade dashboard.' %}
  2. {% trans "Save the trading account credentials securely - you'll need them for platform integration." %}
{% include 'include/warnings.html' with warning='Never share your login details with anyone. We use industry-standard encryption to secure your credentials.' %}

{% trans 'Complete Integration' %}

{% trans "Once you have your trading account login credentials, return to our platform's Automate section to link your HankoTrade account. This will enable automated trading based on your TradingView alerts." %}
